  1. Home
  2. Vendors

Showcase Your Business at Rochester's Biggest Kids' Sale

Put your child or family-focused products in front of hundreds of local parents. Vendor spaces are limited and fill up fast — get in touch early to reserve your spot.

How Vendor Spaces Work

We welcome businesses that offer child or mommy-related products and services. Spaces are limited and awarded on a first-come, first-served basis. We provide a 6-foot table — you bring your goods and your energy.

Steps to Become a Vendor

1

Email to confirm availability

Send an email to dudsforlovebugs@gmail.com to check if vendor space is still open and ask any questions you have.

2

Read the Vendor Agreement

Once approved, review the complete Vendor Agreement below. You must understand and accept all terms before proceeding.

3

Submit payment within 5 business days

After approval, you have five business days to submit your non-refundable vendor fee via PayPal.

4

Payment confirms your acceptance

By submitting payment, you confirm that you have read, agreed to, and accepted all terms and conditions in the Vendor Agreement.

All vendors must offer child or mommy-related products and services.

Vendor Agreement

By submitting payment, you agree to all of the following terms and conditions.

  • Vendor agrees to hold DFLB, Natalie Chandler, the venue, and any volunteer or paid workers harmless and released from liability.
  • Vendor agrees to waive all claims for personal injury.
  • Vendor acknowledges items will be secured overnight at their own risk.

  • Vendor agrees to keep their business within the space provided at their table.
  • Vendor agrees not to hold purchases at their table.
  • Vendor will not shop before the designated shopping times.
  • Sub-leasing of vendor space is prohibited.

  • Vendor agrees to market the DFLB sale through their website, social media, email blasts, contest giveaways, and similar channels.
  • DFLB has the right to use your business name in any advertising or promotion.

  • DFLB reserves the right to remove the vendor at any time.

  • If the vendor chooses not to participate on all sale days, the days chosen must be consecutive. Prorated vendor fees are not available.

  • Payment is non-refundable and can be made via PayPal.
  • No refunds for "Acts of God."
  • By submitting your payment, you are in agreement with everything outlined above.

Ready to Reserve Your Spot?

Reach out to confirm availability, then submit your vendor fee via PayPal.

Email Us

dudsforlovebugs@gmail.com

Pay Vendor Fee

Via PayPal

Duds for Love Bugs

Rochester's favorite children's consignment sale.
